name: ai-cg-studio
description: 个人使用的 Galgame 风格 AI CG 场景工作台与 SD WebUI 网关

scripts.validate: node scripts/build-scenes.js --check && node scripts/optimize-scenes.js --check && node scripts/classify-scene-ratings.js --check && node scripts/validate-scenes.js
scripts.scenes:normalize: node scripts/classify-scene-ratings.js --write && node scripts/optimize-scenes.js --write && node scripts/validate-scenes.js
